title: Yedho Mayakkam Lyrics Billa 2 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yedho Mayakkam
Singers: Yuvan Shankar Raja, Tanvi Shah
Movie: Billa 2
Lyrics : Na MuthuKumar

Yedho yedho oru mayakkam
engo kaatril niraindhirukum
Ulle ulle unai elupum
ulle vanthaal nenju valukkum
Indha ulagam puthu ulagam
kan thirandhum kanavulagam

I like the way you move
you like the way i move
why dont we dance together all night long..

Nee thedum aan magan..
un thoda thaen magan
un munee chuda chuda anaithida vaa
Bounce Bounce Bounce with me
Bounce Bounce Bounce with me

Kannodu paarpadhu.. neril kaanum poiyada
kaneerai paarthidu.. meiyaagum poiye
ennena vendumo inge vanthu uyida
enthan ullam koiyada.. paiyaa

Vizhigalil oru bothai..irunthaale
nee indrai indrai vellalam
venraale thaanale indha ulagam pinaale

Un vaazhkai udaintha vaazhkai
kannodu serthu vaikai
povom va va puthu ulagam kaanbom.

I am gonna get me to my pop beat to low ..
we gonna move together and rock on the floor
coz I wanna say na na na yeyo yeoh..
come closer to me poppy yeyo yeoh.
slant with me na na na yeyo yeoh..
da da dance with me na na na yeyo yeoh

Girl,
Bounce Bounce Bounce with me
Bounce Bounce Bounce with me

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yedho Mayakkam'?

'Yedho Mayakkam' conveys a sense of enchantment and joy in love, inviting listeners to embrace the rhythm of life and dance together.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Billa 2'?

The song reflects the playful and romantic moments in Billa 2, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features the talented singers Tanvi Shah and Yuvan Shankar Raja, with lyrics by Na Muthukumar.

When was 'Yedho Mayakkam' released?

'Yedho Mayakkam' was released on May 1, 2012, as part of the Billa 2 soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Yedho Mayakkam' is a lively duet that encapsulates the thrill of romance and the joy of dancing together. Set against the backdrop of Billa 2, the song showcases the playful interactions between the characters, making it a perfect fit for celebratory moments. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to lose themselves in the rhythm. Overall, it serves as a delightful anthem for love and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yedho Mayakkam from Billa 2 is a vibrant celebration of love and rhythm, showcasing the electrifying collaboration between Tanvi Shah and Yuvan Shankar Raja. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, this song invites you to dance the night away. Experience the magic of this upbeat track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance.
stanzaMeanings: There is some kind of enchantment in the air around us. When you come close, my heart feels alive. This world is a new world, opening up like a dream world.
I like how you move, and you like how I move. Why don't we dance together all night long?
You are the one I seek, your sweetness is like honey. Come, let's bounce together.
Looking into your eyes, I see the tears that fall. Do I need to come here to live, as my heart aches?
If you were to be in my eyes, you would be the one who wins every time in this world.
Your life and my life will come together, and we will see a new world.

I am going to get into my groove, with the beat low. We will move together and rock the floor because I want to say na na na yeyo yeoh. Come closer to me, poppy yeyo yeoh. Lean with me na na na yeyo yeoh. Dance with me na na na yeyo yeoh.
Girl, bounce with me, bounce with me.
